nodes.label: AI for documentation efficiency

nodes.label: AI adherence to user specifications

nodes.label: AI for specialized design work vs. generic best practices

nodes.grounding_span: people using AI as a search engine (i.e a replacement for a google search)

nodes.label: AI as resource for refining and improving output
nodes.label_negative: Blind reliance on AI without analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I pride myself in understanding things I work on 'end to end'

nodes.label: Skill preservation and professional adaptability

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to handle complex constraints
nodes.grounding_span: the models will often ignore me when I ask for this specific thing

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
nodes.grounding_span: I do not see in the short-medium term getting to a place I would use this stuff blindly without careful analysis

nodes.label: Reluctance to maintain writing skills
nodes.grounding_span: I honestly don't care about getting rusty

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: 1-2 rounds of back and forth, then I will take the output at that point and work on improving it myself

nodes.label: End-to-end understanding orientation
